Selected-row icons now adapt like the text.

### Fixed
- **Selected-row icons** now adapt to the accent (dark on light accents, light on dark), exactly like the text — the glyph paths are coloured directly, skipping the icons' transparent bounding box so they never fill into a square.

### Important — clear the skin cache
MediaMonkey caches compiled skins. Delete `%APPDATA%\MediaMonkey5\precompiledLess_Flat Monkey Dark_Desktop.css`, then restart MediaMonkey.
